us-politics.headline: House Races Toward Late-Night Vote on Spy Powers Extension
us-politics.body:
Congressional Republicans are pushing for a last-minute deal to extend controversial surveillance powers under FISA Section 702. House Minority Leader Jeffries expressed deep skepticism about the extension, demanding stronger privacy protections before any vote.

The proposed legislation has sparked intense debate across party lines. Republicans argue the measure is crucial for national security, while Democrats raise concerns about potential civil liberties violations. A late-night vote appears imminent, with negotiations continuing into the early morning hours.

sources.title: Republicans move forward on last-minute spy powers deal, teeing up late-night vote
Jeffries says he’s ‘deeply skeptical’ of FISA extension without new privacy protections

us-politics.headline: Trump Defends Economic Policies Amid Ongoing Iran Tensions
us-politics.body:
Former President Trump addressed economic challenges during a Las Vegas appearance, dismissing inflation concerns and defending his policy approach. He characterized current economic reporting as fake and emphasized his administration's economic strategies.

The speech comes amid ongoing tensions with Iran and complex geopolitical negotiations. Trump claimed Iran had agreed to hand over what he termed nuclear dust - a statement that requires further verification. His economic pitch met with mixed reactions from the audience, reflecting the polarized political landscape.

sources.title: In Las Vegas, Trump’s economic pitch meets a skeptical audience
Trump defends economic policies, casts aside ‘fake inflation’ amid Iran war
Trump says Iran agrees to hand over ‘nuclear dust’

us-politics.headline: Immigration and Border Policy Shifts Signal Administrative Changes
us-politics.body:
The Department of Homeland Security is experiencing significant leadership transitions. Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons has submitted his resignation, marking another shift in the agency's top management.

Simultaneously, the administration is expanding visa restriction policies in the Western Hemisphere. These moves suggest a continued focus on immigration enforcement and border control strategies. The changes reflect ongoing debates about migration, national security, and border management approaches.

sources.title: Acting ICE chief to exit agency: DHS secretary
Trump admin announces expansion of visa restriction policy in Western Hemisphere
Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons submits resignation letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin
Top five takeaways from Homeland Security budget hearings

au-politics.headline: Geelong Refinery Blaze Sparks Fuel Supply Concerns
au-politics.body:
A major fire at the Geelong refinery has triggered national discussions about fuel security. Prime Minister Anthony Albanese insisted no immediate fuel restrictions would be implemented, despite significant damage to Victoria's petrol production infrastructure.

The incident comes amid growing concerns about potential supply disruptions. Taxi drivers have already reported struggling with rising costs, while the Hume Freeway closure near Violet Town has added complexity to transportation challenges.

sources.title: Part of Victoria’s petrol production up in flames
Taxi drivers call for assistance to survive during fuel crisis
Breaking: Hume Freeway closed in both directions after crash near Violet Town
Albanese says no fuel restrictions in wake of massive Geelong refinery fire
Refinery blaze not cause to ratchet up fuel crisis response, Albanese says

au-politics.headline: One Nation Gains Ground in South Australian Electoral Count
au-politics.body:
Ongoing vote counting in the South Australian seat of Narungga has seen One Nation's electoral margin increase. The development highlights the continuing fluidity of electoral outcomes and potential shifts in regional political preferences.

The count reflects the complex landscape of Australian electoral politics, with minor parties continuing to play significant roles in determining representation at state and federal levels.

sources.title: Australia news live: One Nation increases margin in SA seat after extra votes counted; measles alert for Sydney
Missing votes counted in key SA seat see One Nation margin increase

au-politics.headline: Ben Roberts-Smith Granted Bail in War Crimes Case
au-politics.body:
Former SAS soldier Ben Roberts-Smith has been granted bail after being charged with five counts of war crime murder. The decision marks a significant moment in the high-profile legal proceedings against the decorated veteran.

The case continues to draw national attention, representing a complex intersection of military service, alleged misconduct, and legal accountability for actions during military deployments.

sources.title: Ben Roberts-Smith granted bail after being charged with five counts of war crime murder
Former soldier Ben Roberts-Smith to be released from jail after securing bail

world.headline: Lebanon-Israel Ceasefire Begins - Fragile Peace Takes Hold
world.body:
A 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon went into effect Friday, bringing temporary relief to a conflict that has devastated southern Lebanon. Civilians began returning to their homes, though deep skepticism remains about the truce's sustainability.

Negotiations reportedly involved former US President Trump, who claimed credit for forcing Israel to the table. The deal allows displaced residents to return and provides a critical pause in hostilities that have caused widespread destruction.

sources.title: Celebrations in Lebanon as 10-day ceasefire with Israel begins
Celebrations on the road as people begin returning to southern Lebanon
Iran war live: Ceasefire starts in Lebanon as Trump says Tehran deal close
Israel and Lebanon’s 10-day ceasefire goes into effect
Displaced Lebanese wary as ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah begins

world.headline: IMF and World Bank Restore Ties with Venezuela
world.body:
International financial institutions announced they are reestablishing relations with Venezuela, signaling a potential diplomatic and economic thaw. The move comes after years of isolation and economic sanctions that had severely restricted Venezuela's global financial interactions.

The restoration of ties could provide critical economic relief for the struggling nation, potentially opening pathways for investment and financial support that have been blocked for years.

sources.title: IMF, World Bank say they are restoring ties with Venezuela
IMF, World Bank restore relations with Venezuela

world.headline: US Tightens Visa Restrictions for 'Adversary Supporters'
world.body:
The US State Department unveiled new visa restrictions targeting individuals deemed supportive of adversarial nations. The policy represents a significant tightening of diplomatic access and travel permissions for certain international actors.

This move follows ongoing geopolitical tensions and reflects the Biden administration's continued efforts to leverage diplomatic tools in managing international relationships and national security challenges.

sources.title: US State Department restricts visas for those who ‘support adversaries’
US House votes to extend temporary protections for Haitians in Trump rebuke

ai.headline: AI Coding and Enterprise Tools Surge in Valuation
ai.body:
Startup Factory hit a $1.5 billion valuation for enterprise AI coding tools, signaling continued investor confidence in artificial intelligence solutions. The company aims to streamline software development through advanced AI technologies.

In related news, Substrate AI is actively recruiting harness engineers - a move that suggests ongoing expansion in the AI infrastructure space. These developments point to a robust market for AI-powered development platforms.

sources.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
Substrate AI Is Hiring Harness Engineers
OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop

ai.headline: OpenAI Expands with Biology-Focused Language Model
ai.body:
OpenAI launched a biology-tuned large language model, marking a significant step into specialized scientific AI. The model promises to enhance research capabilities by providing domain-specific language processing for life sciences.

This release follows recent trends of AI tools targeting specific academic and research domains. Researchers and scientists could potentially leverage the model for complex biological analysis and computational research.

sources.title: OpenAI starts offering a biology-tuned LLM
GPT‑Rosalind for life sciences research
Mozilla launches Thunderbolt AI client with focus on self-hosted infrastructure

ai.headline: Tech Policy Shifts Target Age Verification and Platform Regulation
ai.body:
A new US bill mandates on-device age verification, signaling increased governmental scrutiny of digital platforms. The legislation represents a growing trend of regulatory intervention in technology and online spaces.

Concurrently, other regulatory actions are emerging - including a California lawsuit alleging Amazon's price-fixing tactics. These developments suggest a more aggressive approach to tech company oversight and consumer protection.

sources.title: US Bill Mandates On-Device Age Verification
New unsealed records reveal Amazon's price-fixing tactics, California AG claims
Ad firms settle with Trump FTC over claims they boycotted conservative media

btc.headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $75K - Bulls Eye $125K Target
btc.body:
Bitcoin rocketed through $75,000 this week after a dramatic short squeeze triggered massive liquidations. Traders saw over $283 million in positions forcibly closed as the price momentum shifted sharply upward.

Analysts now see potential for further gains, with some bulls targeting $125,000 amid improving geopolitical sentiment - particularly following potential U.S.-Iran peace talks. Whale activity suggests strong underlying support, with large holders absorbing 20 times the daily Bitcoin supply over the past month.

sources.title: Bitcoin bulls target $125,000 as U.S.-Iran peace talks trigger risk-on mood
Bitcoin eyes $90K as whales absorb 20x daily BTC supply in 30 days
Bitcoin liquidations top $283M after short squeeze sends BTC price above $75K

btc.headline: U.S. Government Moves Bitcoins from 2016 Bitfinex Hack
btc.body:
Federal authorities transferred $606,000 in Bitcoin connected to the historic 2016 Bitfinex cryptocurrency exchange hack. The coins were moved to Coinbase - a significant development in the long-running investigation.

The transfer highlights ongoing efforts by law enforcement to track and potentially recover funds from major historical crypto theft incidents. Such movements often signal potential future liquidation or further legal proceedings related to the original hack.

sources.title: The U.S. government moves $606,000 in bitcoin linked to the 2016 Bitfinex hack to Coinbase

btc.headline: Bitcoin Gains Institutional Traction with New Investments
btc.body:
Major financial institutions are increasingly embracing Bitcoin as an investment asset. Citi recommended mixing Bitcoin with gold to potentially boost portfolio performance - a notable endorsement from a mainstream bank.

In another sign of growing institutional interest, Charles Schwab is preparing to roll out spot Bitcoin trading for retail clients. Meanwhile, the Czech National Bank is set to discuss its strategy of diversifying reserves with Bitcoin - signaling broader acceptance among national financial institutions.

sources.title: Citi Says Mixing Bitcoin With Gold Can Boost Your Portfolio Performance
Charles Schwab Weighs Prediction Markets Move as Bitcoin, Ethereum Trading Nears
Czech National Bank Governor Will Soon Speak on Why They’re Diversifying Their Reserves With Bitcoin

food.description: Slow-cooked lamb with apricots, almonds, and complex spice blend served over herbed couscous
food.tip: Toast whole spices before grinding to intensify their aromatic oils

health.description: Implement micro-movements and strategic stretching to counteract sedentary muscle tension throughout the workday
health.tip: Set a hourly timer to do 90-second targeted mobility flows that reset spinal and shoulder positioning
